company_context: Financial Infrastructure & Blockchain Technology Solutions | Ripple Link to Home, Ripple`s Company Logo Contact Sales Contact Sales Modernize your financial infrastructure with Ripple Ripple’s payments, custody and stablecoin solutions empower financial institutions to integrate blockchain and digital assets into their business in a simple, secure, compliant way—all in one place. Talk to our Team Payments. Custody. Stablecoin. It’s happening with Ripple. From instant payments to asset tokenization, blockchain and crypto are happening right now, across the world. It’s happening to suppliers, to retailers, to exchanges, to currencies, to sectors, to industries, to markets, and to global businesses. And it’s happening with Ripple. Learn More 3-5s Payments Settlement 1,000,000+ Custody Wallets 90% Global FX Market Coverage Meet our customers Explore what’s possible Ripple Payments Ripple Custody Ripple USD Ripple Payments Arrow icon Ripple Custody Ripple USD Crypto Businesses Unlock growth and enable seamless cross-border money movement with crypto and stablecoin on/off ramps—all via a single connection. Accelerate Growth Payment Service Providers Integrate stablecoins into your payments infrastructure to stay ahead of the competition and access a wide range of instant third-party payouts. Unlock New Markets Fintechs Increase revenue streams and user growth with fast, transparent cross-border payments as a service. Drive Innovation Banks Bypass correspondent banking to turn global payments into a revenue driver and deliver cost savings to your clients. Optimize Payments Move Value Leveraging Ripple’s digital asset custody platform fully integrated into our core banking system, BBVA Switzerland and BBVA NewGen enables its private banking clients to combine traditional financial assets with digital assets with the utmost security. Silvia Ibarra Head of Client Solutions at BBVA Switzerland Ripple Payments has helped accelerate our business, not only through offering faster global payment times and cost savings to our customers but in a big way through the introductions that Ripple has also provided us to large financial institutions and remitters overseas. Andrew Porter Chief Commercial Officer of Flash Payments Ripple brought us payment solutions that upgraded us to a new direction in our payments, creating faster processes and enabling new integrations with our customers. João Manuel Campanelli Freitas Executive Vice President of Travelex Bank We provide regulated, institutional-grade service and through working with Ripple Custody and IBM Cloud, we further establish our commitment to bring the highest levels of security and compliance to our clients and ecosystem. Graham Rodford CEO and Co-Founder of Archax Hear from more customers Ready to get started? Learn how Ripple’s financial infrastructure can help you leverage blockchain technology and digital assets to drive innovation and impact. Contact Us

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like Ripple optimize their financial infrastructure. I came across your company and was impressed with the work you're doing in blockchain and digital assets. Can you tell me a little bit about your current data processing challenges?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, yes. We do have some challenges in terms of scaling our data processing to meet the growing demands of our customers. But we're currently exploring different solutions and evaluating our options. What makes DeepData AI unique compared to other solutions out there?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: That's a great question. Our solution uses AI-powered algorithms to process large amounts of data in real-time, reducing latency and increasing accuracy. We've seen significant results with our existing clients, including a 30% reduction in processing time and a 25% increase in overall efficiency. I'd love to schedule a demo to show you how it works.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I'm interested in learning more, but I have to say that we're on a tight timeline to implement a new solution. We're looking to deploy something within the next 6-8 weeks. Can your solution be integrated with our existing systems within that timeframe?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Absolutely. Our solution is designed to be flexible and scalable, and we have a team of experts who can work with your IT department to ensure a seamless integration. We've worked with similar companies in the past and have a proven track record of meeting tight deadlines. In terms of pricing, our solution is customized to each client's specific needs, but we typically see a ROI within the first 6-12 months.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I see. Well, I have to say that the ROI sounds promising, but I'm concerned about the cost. We're a company that's very mindful of our budget, and I've heard that DeepData AI is on the higher end of the pricing spectrum. Can you tell me more about your pricing model and how it compares to your competitors?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Yes, of course. Our pricing model is based on the volume of data being processed, and we offer tiered pricing to accommodate different business needs. While we may be slightly higher than some of our competitors, our solution offers unparalleled performance and accuracy, which ultimately saves our clients money in the long run. I can offer you a customized quote based on your specific needs, but I can tell you that we're looking at a minimum investment of $100,000 per year.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate your honesty, Alex. However, after careful consideration, I'm afraid that the price is just too high for us. We've gotten quotes from other vendors that are significantly lower, and while I believe DeepData AI has a strong value proposition, it's just not within our budget. I appreciate the time you took to speak with me today, but I think we're going to have to explore other options.

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Price
Feedback: The seller should have been more prepared to address the buyer's budget concerns and potentially offer more flexible pricing options to stay competitive. Sentiment: Neutral
